ForgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
ForgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password
ForgotPassword.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
ForgotPassword.resetInstructions: We've sent you a password reset link. Please check your email.

ResetPassword.title: Reset Password
ResetPassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
ResetPassword.invalidTokenDescription: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
ResetPassword.successDescription: Your password has been reset successfully. Redirecting...

Legal.termsIntro: Welcome to Marketna. By using our website and services, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions.
Legal.privacyIntro: At Marketna, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information.
Legal.useOfServiceContent: Our services are provided for your personal and non-commercial use. You agree not to misuse the services or help anyone else do so.
Legal.dataCollectionContent: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, make a purchase, or contact us for support.
Legal.infoUsageContent: We use your information to provide and improve our services, process transactions, and communicate important updates regarding your account or our marketplace.
Legal.cookiesContent: We use essential cookies to maintain your session and preferences. By using Marketna, you consent to our use of these technologies for a better shopping experience.
Legal.communityContent: We expect all users to respect the platform and other participants. Any form of harassment or unauthorized data extraction is strictly prohibited.
Legal.agreementPre: Agreement to these terms is prerequisite for using Marketna services.

TwoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
TwoFactor.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account
TwoFactor.setupDescription: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app
TwoFactor.verifyDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
TwoFactor.scanQrCodeSuccess: QR code generated! Scan it with your authenticator app
TwoFactor.enrollFailed: Failed to setup 2FA. Please try again
TwoFactor.secretKeyDescription: If you can't scan the QR code, enter this key manually

Verify.title: Two-Factor Authentication
Verify.enterCodeDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app

callback.signInFailedDescription: Unable to sign in with Google. Please try again.
callback.signInSuccessDesc: Would you like to enable two-factor authentication for enhanced security?
